---
title: "APP"
author: "Kellie Linehan"
date: "2026-03-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# ── Libraries ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
library(shiny)
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)

# ── Load data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
game     <- read.csv("~/Downloads/Game_Cleaned (1).csv",     stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
practice <- read.csv("~/Downloads/Practice_Cleaned (1).csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# ── Prepare each dataset ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
prep_shots <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      made       = as.integer(MadeShot == "TRUE" | MadeShot == TRUE),
      shot_zone  = factor(ShotZone,
                          levels = c("In the Paint", "Mid Range 2's",
                                     "Corner 3's", "Above Break 3's")),
      contest    = factor(Shot.Contest,
                          levels = c("Wide Open", "Lightly Contested",
                                     "Highly Contested", "Blocked")),
      shot_type  = factor(Shot.Type),
      shot_clock = case_when(
        Shot.Clock == "5-0"   ~ 1,
        Shot.Clock == "10-6"  ~ 2,
        Shot.Clock == "21-11" ~ 3,
        Shot.Clock == "22+"   ~ 4,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      shot_value = as.numeric(ShotValue)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(made), !is.na(shot_clock), !is.na(shot_value))
}

train_data <- prep_shots(practice)   # MODEL TRAINED ON PRACTICE
test_data  <- prep_shots(game)       # MODEL TESTED ON GAME

# ── Fit logistic regression ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# All predictors have >1 level in practice data, so we use all four
shot_glm <- glm(
  made ~ shot_zone + shot_clock + contest + shot_type,
  data   = train_data,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

# ── Generate predictions on game data ─────────────────────────────────────────
test_data <- test_data %>%
  mutate(
    p_make           = predict(shot_glm, newdata = test_data, type = "response"),
    exp_points       = p_make * shot_value,
    actual_points    = made * shot_value,
    points_above_exp = actual_points - exp_points
  )

# ── Summary tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Per-player overall summary (all zones combined)
player_summary <- test_data %>%
  group_by(Shooter) %>%
  summarise(
    attempts          = n(),
    makes             = sum(made),
    fg_pct            = round(makes / attempts * 100, 1),
    actual_pts        = round(sum(actual_points), 1),
    expected_pts      = round(sum(exp_points), 1),
    pts_above_exp     = round(actual_pts - expected_pts, 1),
    pts_above_exp_100 = round(100 * pts_above_exp / attempts, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(pts_above_exp_100))

# Per-player × zone
player_zone_summary <- test_data %>%
  group_by(Shooter, ShotZone) %>%
  summarise(
    attempts          = n(),
    makes             = sum(made),
    fg_pct            = round(makes / attempts * 100, 1),
    actual_pts        = round(sum(actual_points), 1),
    expected_pts      = round(sum(exp_points), 1),
    pts_above_exp     = round(actual_pts - expected_pts, 1),
    pts_above_exp_100 = round(100 * pts_above_exp / attempts, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Per-player × shot type
player_type_summary <- test_data %>%
  group_by(Shooter, Shot.Type) %>%
  summarise(
    attempts          = n(),
    makes             = sum(made),
    fg_pct            = round(makes / attempts * 100, 1),
    actual_pts        = round(sum(actual_points), 1),
    expected_pts      = round(sum(exp_points), 1),
    pts_above_exp     = round(actual_pts - expected_pts, 1),
    pts_above_exp_100 = round(100 * pts_above_exp / attempts, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Per-player × contest level
player_contest_summary <- test_data %>%
  group_by(Shooter, Shot.Contest) %>%
  summarise(
    attempts          = n(),
    makes             = sum(made),
    fg_pct            = round(makes / attempts * 100, 1),
    actual_pts        = round(sum(actual_points), 1),
    expected_pts      = round(sum(exp_points), 1),
    pts_above_exp     = round(actual_pts - expected_pts, 1),
    pts_above_exp_100 = round(100 * pts_above_exp / attempts, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

all_players <- sort(unique(player_summary$Shooter))

# ── Colour palette ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
au_red  <- "#CC0000"
au_navy <- "#002147"
bg_light <- "#f8f9fa"

zone_colors <- c(
  "In the Paint"    = "#1a6faf",
  "Mid Range 2's"   = "#e8a838",
  "Corner 3's"      = "#3aaa72",
  "Above Break 3's" = "#cc4444"
)

# ── Helper: PAE colour (red/green) ────────────────────────────────────────────
pae_fill <- function(vals) {
  ifelse(vals >= 0, "#3aaa72", "#cc4444")
}

# ── UI ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ui <- fluidPage(
  tags$head(
    tags$style(HTML(sprintf("
      body { background-color: %s; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; }
      .navbar-brand, h2, h3, h4 { color: %s; font-weight: 700; }
      .well { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; }
      .nav-tabs > li.active > a { border-top: 3px solid %s; font-weight: 600; }
      .table thead th { background-color: %s; color: white; }
      .section-title { color: %s; border-bottom: 2px solid %s;
                       padding-bottom: 4px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
      .stat-box { background: white; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 18px;
                  margin: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.1);
                  display: inline-block; min-width: 130px; text-align: center; }
      .stat-value { font-size: 1.8em; font-weight: 700; color: %s; }
      .stat-label { font-size: .85em; color: #555; margin-top: 2px; }
    ", bg_light, au_navy, au_red, au_navy, au_red, au_red, au_navy)))
  ),

  # ── Header ──
  div(style = sprintf("background-color:%s;padding:18px 24px;margin-bottom:20px;
                        border-radius:0 0 10px 10px;", au_navy),
    h2(style = "color:white;margin:0;", "AU Men's Basketball — Shooting Dashboard"),
    p(style  = "color:#aac4e0;margin:4px 0 0;font-size:.9em;",
      "Model trained on practice data · Evaluated on game data")
  ),

  tabsetPanel(
    id = "main_tabs",

    # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # TAB 1: Team Overview
    # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    tabPanel("Team Overview",
      br(),
      fluidRow(
        column(12,
          h4(class = "section-title", "Team-wide performance (game data)"),
          fluidRow(
            column(3,
              div(class = "stat-box",
                div(class = "stat-value", nrow(test_data)),
                div(class = "stat-label", "Total Attempts")
              )
            ),
            column(3,
              div(class = "stat-box",
                div(class = "stat-value",
                    paste0(round(mean(test_data$made)*100, 1), "%")),
                div(class = "stat-label", "FG%")
              )
            ),
            column(3,
              div(class = "stat-box",
                div(class = "stat-value",
                    round(sum(test_data$actual_points), 0)),
                div(class = "stat-label", "Total Points")
              )
            ),
            column(3,
              div(class = "stat-box",
                div(class = "stat-value",
                    round(sum(test_data$points_above_exp), 1)),
                div(class = "stat-label", "Total Pts Above Exp")
              )
            )
          ),
          br(),
          h4(class = "section-title", "Player leaderboard — Points above expected per 100 shots"),
          tableOutput("team_leaderboard"),
          br(),
          h4(class = "section-title", "Team efficiency by shot zone"),
          plotOutput("team_zone_plot", height = "320px"),
          br(),
          h4(class = "section-title", "Team efficiency by contest level"),
          plotOutput("team_contest_plot", height = "320px")
        )
      )
    ),

    # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # TAB 2: Individual Player
    # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    tabPanel("Individual Player",
      br(),
      sidebarLayout(
        sidebarPanel(width = 3,
          selectInput("player", "Select player:",
                      choices  = all_players,
                      selected = all_players[1]),
          hr(),
          h5(style = "font-weight:600;", "About this dashboard"),
          p(style = "font-size:.85em; color:#555;",
            "Points Above Expected (PAE) measures how many actual points a player
             scored versus what the model predicted given shot difficulty.
             Positive = above expectation. PAE/100 normalises for volume.")
        ),
        mainPanel(width = 9,
          h3(textOutput("player_title")),

          # Stat boxes
          uiOutput("player_stat_boxes"),
          br(),

          tabsetPanel(
            tabPanel("By Zone",
              br(),
              h4(class = "section-title", "Performance by shot zone"),
              tableOutput("zone_table"),
              br(),
              plotOutput("zone_barplot", height = "300px")
            ),
            tabPanel("By Shot Type",
              br(),
              h4(class = "section-title", "Performance by shot type"),
              tableOutput("type_table"),
              br(),
              plotOutput("type_barplot", height = "300px")
            ),
            tabPanel("By Contest Level",
              br(),
              h4(class = "section-title", "Performance by contest level"),
              tableOutput("contest_table"),
              br(),
              plotOutput("contest_barplot", height = "300px")
            )
          )
        )
      )
    ),

    # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    # TAB 3: Player Comparison
    # ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    tabPanel("Compare Players",
      br(),
      fluidRow(
        column(4,
          selectInput("cmp_p1", "Player 1:",
                      choices  = all_players,
                      selected = all_players[1])
        ),
        column(4,
          selectInput("cmp_p2", "Player 2:",
                      choices  = all_players,
                      selected = all_players[min(2, length(all_players))])
        ),
        column(4,
          selectInput("cmp_metric", "Compare by:",
                      choices = c(
                        "PAE per 100 shots"  = "pts_above_exp_100",
                        "Total PAE"          = "pts_above_exp",
                        "FG%"                = "fg_pct",
                        "Actual points"      = "actual_pts"
                      ))
        )
      ),
      h4(class = "section-title", "Shot zone comparison"),
      plotOutput("cmp_zone_plot", height = "350px"),
      br(),
      h4(class = "section-title", "Shot type comparison"),
      plotOutput("cmp_type_plot", height = "350px")
    )
  )
)

# ── Server ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # ── Reactive subsets ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  player_zone    <- reactive({
    player_zone_summary %>%
      filter(Shooter == input$player) %>%
      arrange(desc(pts_above_exp_100))
  })

  player_type    <- reactive({
    player_type_summary %>%
      filter(Shooter == input$player) %>%
      arrange(desc(pts_above_exp_100))
  })

  player_contest <- reactive({
    player_contest_summary %>%
      filter(Shooter == input$player) %>%
      arrange(desc(pts_above_exp_100))
  })

  player_overall <- reactive({
    player_summary %>% filter(Shooter == input$player)
  })

  # ── TAB 1: Team Overview ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$team_leaderboard <- renderTable({
    player_summary %>%
      select(
        Player              = Shooter,
        Attempts            = attempts,
        Makes               = makes,
        `FG%`               = fg_pct,
        `Actual Pts`        = actual_pts,
        `Expected Pts`      = expected_pts,
        `PAE`               = pts_above_exp,
        `PAE / 100`         = pts_above_exp_100
      )
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE, bordered = TRUE)

  output$team_zone_plot <- renderPlot({
    test_data %>%
      group_by(ShotZone) %>%
      summarise(
        attempts      = n(),
        pts_above_exp = sum(points_above_exp),
        pae_100       = 100 * pts_above_exp / attempts,
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(ShotZone = fct_reorder(ShotZone, pae_100)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = ShotZone, y = pae_100, fill = ShotZone)) +
      geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = .6, linetype = "dashed") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = zone_colors) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(x = NULL, y = "PAE per 100 shots",
           title = "Team PAE per 100 shots by zone") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = au_navy))
  })

  output$team_contest_plot <- renderPlot({
    contest_order <- c("Wide Open", "Lightly Contested",
                       "Highly Contested", "Blocked")
    test_data %>%
      group_by(Shot.Contest) %>%
      summarise(
        attempts      = n(),
        fg_pct        = mean(made) * 100,
        exp_fg        = mean(p_make) * 100,
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(Shot.Contest = factor(Shot.Contest, levels = contest_order)) %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = c(fg_pct, exp_fg),
                   names_to = "type", values_to = "pct") %>%
      mutate(type = recode(type,
                           fg_pct = "Actual FG%",
                           exp_fg = "Expected FG%")) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = Shot.Contest, y = pct, fill = type)) +
      geom_col(position = "dodge") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Actual FG%" = au_red,
                                   "Expected FG%" = au_navy)) +
      labs(x = "Contest level", y = "FG%", fill = NULL,
           title = "Actual vs expected FG% by contest level") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", colour = au_navy),
            legend.position = "top")
  })

  # ── TAB 2: Individual ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$player_title <- renderText({
    paste("Game-day performance —", input$player)
  })

  output$player_stat_boxes <- renderUI({
    p <- player_overall()
    if (nrow(p) == 0) return(p("No data for this player."))

    pae_color <- if (p$pts_above_exp >= 0) "#3aaa72" else "#cc4444"

    fluidRow(
      column(2, div(class = "stat-box",
        div(class = "stat-value", p$attempts),
        div(class = "stat-label", "Attempts"))),
      column(2, div(class = "stat-box",
        div(class = "stat-value", paste0(p$fg_pct, "%")),
        div(class = "stat-label", "FG%"))),
      column(2, div(class = "stat-box",
        div(class = "stat-value", p$actual_pts),
        div(class = "stat-label", "Actual Points"))),
      column(2, div(class = "stat-box",
        div(class = "stat-value", p$expected_pts),
        div(class = "stat-label", "Expected Points"))),
      column(2, div(class = "stat-box",
        div(class = "stat-value",
            style = paste0("color:", pae_color, ";"), p$pts_above_exp),
        div(class = "stat-label", "Pts Above Exp"))),
      column(2, div(class = "stat-box",
        div(class = "stat-value",
            style = paste0("color:", pae_color, ";"), p$pts_above_exp_100),
        div(class = "stat-label", "PAE / 100")))
    )
  })

  # Zone tab
  output$zone_table <- renderTable({
    player_zone() %>%
      select(
        `Shot Zone`     = ShotZone,
        Attempts        = attempts,
        Makes           = makes,
        `FG%`           = fg_pct,
        `Actual Pts`    = actual_pts,
        `Expected Pts`  = expected_pts,
        `PAE`           = pts_above_exp,
        `PAE / 100`     = pts_above_exp_100
      )
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE, bordered = TRUE)

  output$zone_barplot <- renderPlot({
    df <- player_zone() %>%
      mutate(ShotZone = fct_reorder(ShotZone, pts_above_exp_100))
    ggplot(df, aes(x = ShotZone, y = pts_above_exp_100, fill = ShotZone)) +
      geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = .6, linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_text(aes(label = round(pts_above_exp_100, 1),
                    hjust = ifelse(pts_above_exp_100 >= 0, -.15, 1.1)),
                size = 3.8) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = zone_colors,
                        breaks = names(zone_colors)) +
      coord_flip() +
      expand_limits(y = c(
        min(df$pts_above_exp_100) * 1.2,
        max(df$pts_above_exp_100) * 1.2
      )) +
      labs(x = NULL, y = "PAE per 100 shots",
           title = paste("PAE per 100 shots by zone —", input$player)) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = au_navy))
  })

  # Shot type tab
  output$type_table <- renderTable({
    player_type() %>%
      select(
        `Shot Type`     = Shot.Type,
        Attempts        = attempts,
        Makes           = makes,
        `FG%`           = fg_pct,
        `Actual Pts`    = actual_pts,
        `Expected Pts`  = expected_pts,
        `PAE`           = pts_above_exp,
        `PAE / 100`     = pts_above_exp_100
      )
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE, bordered = TRUE)

  output$type_barplot <- renderPlot({
    df <- player_type() %>%
      mutate(Shot.Type = fct_reorder(Shot.Type, pts_above_exp_100))
    ggplot(df, aes(x = Shot.Type, y = pts_above_exp_100,
                   fill = pts_above_exp_100 >= 0)) +
      geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = .6, linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_text(aes(label = round(pts_above_exp_100, 1),
                    hjust = ifelse(pts_above_exp_100 >= 0, -.15, 1.1)),
                size = 3.8) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#3aaa72", "FALSE" = "#cc4444")) +
      coord_flip() +
      expand_limits(y = c(
        min(df$pts_above_exp_100, 0) * 1.2,
        max(df$pts_above_exp_100, 0) * 1.2
      )) +
      labs(x = NULL, y = "PAE per 100 shots",
           title = paste("PAE per 100 shots by shot type —", input$player)) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = au_navy))
  })

  # Contest tab
  output$contest_table <- renderTable({
    player_contest() %>%
      select(
        `Contest Level`  = Shot.Contest,
        Attempts         = attempts,
        Makes            = makes,
        `FG%`            = fg_pct,
        `Actual Pts`     = actual_pts,
        `Expected Pts`   = expected_pts,
        `PAE`            = pts_above_exp,
        `PAE / 100`      = pts_above_exp_100
      )
  }, striped = TRUE, hover = TRUE, bordered = TRUE)

  output$contest_barplot <- renderPlot({
    contest_order <- c("Wide Open", "Lightly Contested",
                       "Highly Contested", "Blocked")
    df <- player_contest() %>%
      mutate(
        Shot.Contest = factor(Shot.Contest, levels = contest_order)
      ) %>%
      arrange(Shot.Contest)
    ggplot(df, aes(x = Shot.Contest, y = pts_above_exp_100,
                   fill = pts_above_exp_100 >= 0)) +
      geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = .6, linetype = "dashed") +
      geom_text(aes(label = round(pts_above_exp_100, 1),
                    vjust = ifelse(pts_above_exp_100 >= 0, -.4, 1.2)),
                size = 3.8) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#3aaa72", "FALSE" = "#cc4444")) +
      expand_limits(y = c(
        min(df$pts_above_exp_100, 0) * 1.2,
        max(df$pts_above_exp_100, 0) * 1.2
      )) +
      labs(x = "Contest level", y = "PAE per 100 shots",
           title = paste("PAE per 100 shots by contest —", input$player)) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", colour = au_navy))
  })

  # ── TAB 3: Comparison ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$cmp_zone_plot <- renderPlot({
    req(input$cmp_p1, input$cmp_p2)
    metric <- input$cmp_metric

    df <- player_zone_summary %>%
      filter(Shooter %in% c(input$cmp_p1, input$cmp_p2)) %>%
      mutate(
        ShotZone = factor(ShotZone,
                          levels = c("In the Paint", "Mid Range 2's",
                                     "Corner 3's", "Above Break 3's")),
        Shooter  = factor(Shooter, levels = c(input$cmp_p1, input$cmp_p2))
      )

    ggplot(df, aes(x = ShotZone, y = .data[[metric]], fill = Shooter)) +
      geom_col(position = "dodge") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = .5, linetype = "dashed") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c(au_red, au_navy)) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(x = NULL, y = metric, fill = NULL,
           title = paste("Shot zone comparison —",
                         gsub("#\\d+ ", "", input$cmp_p1), "vs",
                         gsub("#\\d+ ", "", input$cmp_p2))) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(plot.title   = element_text(face = "bold", colour = au_navy),
            legend.position = "top")
  })

  output$cmp_type_plot <- renderPlot({
    req(input$cmp_p1, input$cmp_p2)
    metric <- input$cmp_metric

    df <- player_type_summary %>%
      filter(Shooter %in% c(input$cmp_p1, input$cmp_p2)) %>%
      mutate(Shooter = factor(Shooter, levels = c(input$cmp_p1, input$cmp_p2)))

    ggplot(df, aes(x = fct_reorder(Shot.Type, .data[[metric]]),
                   y = .data[[metric]], fill = Shooter)) +
      geom_col(position = "dodge") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = .5, linetype = "dashed") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c(au_red, au_navy)) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(x = NULL, y = metric, fill = NULL,
           title = paste("Shot type comparison —",
                         gsub("#\\d+ ", "", input$cmp_p1), "vs",
                         gsub("#\\d+ ", "", input$cmp_p2))) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
      theme(plot.title   = element_text(face = "bold", colour = au_navy),
            legend.position = "top")
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
